scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,API -c green,yellow "node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js apps/frontend --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "node node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs watch apps/backend/src/server.ts"
scripts.build: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b apps/frontend/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build apps/frontend && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/backend/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b apps/frontend/tsconfig.json --pretty false && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/backend/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
